home.title: Zuki Apps
home.subtitle: Zuki Apps — Mobile Apps for iOS & Android
home.seoTitle: Zuki Apps — iOS & Android Mobile Apps
home.metaDescription: Privacy-first mobile apps from Israel: Hush Gallery, ZuList, Whistle Camera, HIIT timers & more. Free on iOS & Android.
home.tagline: Creating smart and intuitive mobile applications that make everyday life easier

aboutTeaser.body: Independent developer in Israel — from DreamBit Apps to privacy-first Flutter apps, with original Zuli Monster illustrations in every app.

story.title: My Story
story.p1: Between 2012 and 2016, I developed mobile applications for Android and iOS as part of DreamBit Apps. During those years, I had the opportunity to work on various projects, learning the ins and outs of mobile development and creating apps that users loved.
story.p2: After a long break from active development, I've returned to pursue my passion - mobile app development. This time, I'm building apps as a hobby, driven by my love for technology and creativity.
story.p3: Today, I focus on developing smart and intuitive mobile applications that can help people in their daily lives. Each app I create is crafted with attention to detail, user experience, and innovative solutions to real-world problems.

zuliMonsters.title: Zuli Monsters
zuliMonsters.description: One of the unique aspects of my apps are the original illustrations I create, which I call Zuli Monsters.
zuliMonsters.more: These cute and colorful creatures accompany users throughout their app experience, adding a touch of fun and personality to every interaction. You'll be hearing more about them soon!

home.underConstructionMessage: We're working hard to bring you something amazing. Check back soon!

zulist.title: ZuList - Manage & Share Lists
zulist.subtitle: My first app - Smart shopping list management
zulist.description: ZuList is a Flutter-based shopping list application designed to make grocery shopping easier and more collaborative. With real-time sharing, offline support, and smart product recommendations, it's the perfect companion for families and friends who shop together. Available now on the App Store!

hushGallery.title: Hush Gallery - Hide Photos & Videos
hushGallery.subtitle: Private photo gallery
hushGallery.description: A secure and private photo gallery application with local-first storage, optional encrypted cloud backup (iCloud/Google Drive), custom tags, app lock, and premium features. Keep your personal photos safe and organized.
hushGallery.underConstructionMessage: We're working hard to bring you something amazing. Check back soon!

whistleCamera.title: Whistle Camera - Selfie & More
whistleCamera.subtitle: Whistle to snap — hands-free photos & video
whistleCamera.description: Just whistle and your phone takes the shot. Hands-free selfies, pet photos, and group shots — no remote, no timer sprint. iOS & Android, 40+ languages.
whistleCamera.underConstructionMessage: We're working hard to bring you something amazing. Check back soon!

powerIntervalTimer.title: Power Interval Timer - Tabata & HIIT
powerIntervalTimer.subtitle: Tabata, HIIT & Workout Timer
powerIntervalTimer.description: A minimal, fast, offline interval workout timer for Tabata, HIIT, and short workouts. Features configurable workouts, multiple display modes, sound alerts, and screen casting support.
powerIntervalTimer.learnMore: Learn more about Power Interval Timer →
powerIntervalTimer.underConstructionMessage: We're working hard to bring you something amazing. Check back soon!

bitScope.title: Bit Scope - Bit & Number Calculator
bitScope.subtitle: Bit-level inspector and converter
bitScope.description: A powerful bit-level inspector and converter for developers, engineers, and students. Visualize, manipulate, and convert numbers at the bit level across multiple number systems and formats.
bitScope.underConstructionMessage: We're working hard to bring you something amazing. Check back soon!

sudokuPuzzle.title: Sudoku Fun Go - Classic Sudoku
sudokuPuzzle.subtitle: 9×9 Sudoku puzzle game
sudokuPuzzle.description: A classic 9×9 Sudoku game with four difficulty levels, notes, hints, undo, timer, and persistent statistics. Fully localized in 12 languages. Game Center and Play Games support.
sudokuPuzzle.learnMore: Learn more about Sudoku Fun Go →
sudokuPuzzle.underConstructionMessage: We're working hard to bring you something amazing. Check back soon!

footballTrivia.title: Football Trivia Master
footballTrivia.subtitle: 450+ timed football quiz questions
footballTrivia.description: Test your football knowledge with timed questions, streaks, leaderboards, and 12 languages. Free on iOS and Android.
footballTrivia.learnMore: Learn more about Football Trivia Master →

funFactsTrivia.title: Fun Facts! Trivia
funFactsTrivia.subtitle: Trivia: 8 categories, streaks, stats, Easy–Hard, offline.
funFactsTrivia.description: Fast multiple-choice trivia across eight themed categories, three difficulties, streaks and session stats. Coming soon to the App Store and Google Play.
funFactsTrivia.learnMore: Learn more about Fun Facts! Trivia →

collagio.title: Collagio - Photo Collage Maker
collagio.subtitle: Turn 2–10 photos into a collage in seconds
collagio.description: Pick photos, choose a layout, add filters and Zuli Monsters stickers, then save or share. No account needed.

trackLedger.title: Track Ledger
trackLedger.subtitle: Log GPS data
trackLedger.description: Offline-first GPS logger: raw GNSS points, configurable sampling, export (CSV, GPX, GeoJSON), and map overlays on OpenStreetMap.

tempoLabPro.title: TempoLab Pro - Tempo & Pitch
tempoLabPro.subtitle: Tempo and pitch audio practice
tempoLabPro.description: Production-ready Flutter app for tempo and pitch audio practice. Tap tempo, BPM detection, pitch shift, loop, markers, and export.
tempoLabPro.underConstructionMessage: We're working hard to bring you something amazing. Check back soon!

items.question: Who is Zuki Apps?
items.answer: Zuki Apps is an independent mobile software publisher. The developer is based in Israel, previously developed Android and iOS apps as part of DreamBit Apps (2012–2016), and now ships consumer apps built with Flutter for iOS and Android.

items.question: What is zukiapps.com?
items.answer: This site is the public marketing presence for Zuki Apps: short descriptions of each app, links to the App Store and Google Play when available, support email, and links to each app’s Privacy Policy and Terms of Use. There is no user login on the website itself.

items.question: How do I contact Zuki Apps?
items.answer: For support and general inquiries, email zuki.apps.dev@gmail.com. The same address appears on app pages and in store listings where applicable.

items.question: Where can I read privacy policies and terms?
items.answer: Each app has its own pages: open the app’s section on this site and follow Privacy Policy and Terms of Use. EU Digital Services Act (DSA) trader information is on the DSA Compliance page. A legacy DreamBit archive is also linked from the footer.

items.question: Which apps are listed on this site?
items.answer: The home page showcases multiple titles (for example ZuList, Hush Gallery, games, utilities, Track Ledger, Noise Meter — Shusher, Paratrooper Blitz, and others). Use the app tiles to open each product page for details and policies.

items.question: Is there a public API documented here?
items.answer: No. This website does not document a public REST or GraphQL API for end users. Apps use their own clients on the device and normal app-store distribution.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: Have a question, an idea, or just want to connect? I’d love to hear from you. Feedback, feature requests, and bug reports are welcome — I read what you send and do my best to reply to everyone.

social.title: Social Media
social.description: Everyone is welcome to follow on social media for news, app updates, and a simple way to stay in touch. Feel free to reach out with feedback or requests there too — I do my best to respond to people across email and social.

footer.copyright: © 2025 Zuki Apps - All rights reserved. Zuki Apps is a brand of <pulse>Pulse Studio</pulse>.
footer.tagline: Developed in Israel • As a hobby • With passion

noiseMeterShusher.title: Noise Meter — Shusher
noiseMeterShusher.subtitle: Real-time dB & noise scoring
noiseMeterShusher.description: Measure ambient noise with timed sessions, category scoring, local history, CSV export, and charts. Ad-supported with optional Premium unlock.
noiseMeterShusher.learnMore: Learn more about Noise Meter — Shusher →

paratrooperBlitz.title: Paratrooper Blitz
paratrooperBlitz.subtitle: Classic arcade action
paratrooperBlitz.description: Destroy aircraft and paratroopers before they reach your turret. Arcade and Classic DOS modes, scores, career ranks, leaderboards and achievements on mobile.

otherZukiApps.title: More from Zuki Apps
otherZukiApps.subtitle: Explore other free iOS & Android apps from the same developer.

about.metaTitle: About Zuki Apps — Mobile Developer | Zuki Apps
about.metaDescription: Zuki Apps builds privacy-first iOS & Android apps from Israel — ZuList, Hush Gallery, Whistle Camera & more. Learn about the developer.
about.title: About Zuki Apps
about.subtitle: Independent mobile developer — iOS & Android
about.p1: Zuki Apps is an independent mobile software studio based in Israel. We ship practical, privacy-conscious apps for everyday life — private photo vaults, hands-free cameras, shared shopping lists, fitness timers, trivia games, and developer tools.
about.p2: Every app is built with Flutter for a consistent experience on iPhone, iPad, and Android. We favor on-device processing, clear privacy policies, and no-account flows where possible.
about.p3: Between 2012 and 2016, our apps shipped under DreamBit Apps. Today the Zuki Apps catalog continues that craft with new titles and long-term support for existing users.
about.catalogBody: Browse all product pages, support, and policies from the home page or our machine-readable catalog at /api/site-facts.

traderIdentification.title: Trader Identification
traderIdentification.content: Zuki Apps operates as a trader under the EU Digital Services Act (DSA). All applications (ZuList, Hush Gallery, Whistle Camera, Power Interval Timer, Sudoku Fun Go, Fun Facts! Trivia, and other Zuki Apps titles) are provided by Zuki Apps, a business entity committed to compliance with EU regulations.

consumerRights.title: Consumer Rights
consumerRights.content: As a trader, we are committed to transparent business practices and compliance with EU consumer protection laws. Users in the European Union have specific rights, including:
items: Right to clear information about the service and terms
Right to withdraw from contracts (14-day cooling-off period for digital content, subject to applicable law)
Right to refunds (subject to applicable law and platform policies)

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: For inquiries, complaints, or to exercise your consumer rights, please contact us:
